name: Lyxor Dow Jones Industrial Average (LUX) UCITS ETF
summary: The ETF Dow Jones Industrial AverageSM is an exchange-traded fund linked to the performance of the Dow Jones Industrial AverageSM. Dividends are not included in the index performance. However, dividends are always included in the ComStage ETF and hence increase the performance of the ETF.

name: Lyxor MSCI World (LUX) UCITS ETF
summary:
The investment seeks to track the price and yield performance, before fees and expenses, of the MSCI Total Return Net World index.
 The index is an after-float market capitalization weighted index, the performance of international stock markets in the developed Industrialized countries in the world based on the total return with net dividends reinvested be mapped.
